title: English Teacher (Primary) [Early-Career / Fresh Graduates Welcome]
description:
About the Role

At illum.e, we are not ‘just another tuition centre’. We are a premium English education brand known for clarity of method, depth of thinking, and consistently strong student outcomes.

This role is designed specifically for newly-graduated educators or tutors with limited formal classroom experience who want to be trained properly, mentored closely, and developed into confident, high-impact English teachers. If you have mainly done 1-to-1 private tutoring, this role offers the structure, support, and pedagogy to help you scale your teaching skill professionally.

You will focus primarily on teaching excellence and classroom delivery, while being gradually introduced to curriculum thinking through guided exposure — not thrown into the deep end.

Teaching locations will also be based on our five branches - Jurong East, Bukit Timah, Novena, Hougang and Marine Parade.

Key Responsibilities

Teaching & Classroom Delivery

  • Deliver illum.e’s Primary English lessons using our structured lesson plans, materials, and teaching frameworks

  • Build students’ confidence, clarity of expression, and examination readiness through guided practice and feedback

  • Learn to manage small-group classrooms effectively, even if your prior experience has been mostly 1-to-1

Pedagogical Development (Training-Focused)

  • Undergo structured in-house training in lesson delivery, questioning techniques, explanation clarity, and marking standards

  • Observe experienced teachers, co-teach where appropriate, and receive regular feedback on your teaching

  • Develop strong fundamentals in grammar teaching, writing instruction, and comprehension strategies

Student Progress & Support

  • Monitor student understanding during lessons and flag learning gaps to Leads

  • Apply feedback from mentors to refine your teaching and communication week by week

Light Curriculum Exposure (Supported)

  • Support minor curriculum refinement tasks (e.g. improving worksheets, suggesting clarifications) under guidance

  • No expectation to independently design full curricula or assessments at this stage

Who We’re Looking For

  • Fresh graduates or early-career educators with a strong command of English

  • Tutors with mainly 1-to-1 private tutoring experience who want to grow into classroom teaching

  • Clear communicators who enjoy explaining ideas simply and precisely

  • Coachable, reflective, and genuinely eager to improve as teachers

  • Prior MOE or centre experience is welcome but not required

Why illum.e?

Serious Training, Not Sink-or-Swim
You are not expected to ‘already know everything’. We invest time in grooming you into a confident, structured, and respected educator.

Strong Brand, Real Demand
Students come to illum.e because of trust, results, and reputation — not aggressive sales.

Excellent Teaching Support
You teach with well-designed materials, clear lesson objectives, and marking guidance — not last-minute scrambling.

Low Politics, High Standards
A professional culture focused on growth, clarity, and doing the work well.

Clear Growth Pathways
Strong performers can progress into senior teaching roles, curriculum tracks, or academic leadership over time.

Future-Facing Organisation
Exposure to AI-assisted learning tools, digital platforms, and long-term expansion plans — without pressure to ‘perform tech’.

Staff Benefits

  • Competitive salary with annual reviews

  • Semester-based performance bonuses and retention incentives

  • Paid training sessions, lesson observations, and curriculum workshops

  • Full curriculum and marking support

  • Mentorship from experienced Teaching and Curriculum Leads

  • Direct access to Academic Directors and senior leadership

  • Two full rest days per week

  • Flexible scheduling based on teaching availability

  • Annual retreats, festive gatherings, and wellness initiatives

postedCompany.description: Thinkers' Vault is the umbrella company of various education and technology firms. Under the collective is illum.e and Pivot Physics, the most sought after tuition and enrichment centres in Singapore. As an MOE-registered centre, illum.e offers high quality, results proven English and IP Language Arts Tuition, Humanities Tuition for Primary and Secondary School and GP Tuition for Junior College in online and/ or physical lesson modes. As a specialised tuition centre, Pivot Physics provides high-quality, results-driven Physics tuition for O-Level, IP, and JC students, backed by an evolving SEAB-based curriculum and robust academic support.
postedCompany.name: THINKERS' VAULT PTE. LTD.
